name: Lab Notebook
description: Primary authoring surface for a scientific research lab. Researchers maintain an electronic lab notebook with hierarchical page tree, rich entries, and checklist protocols.

page_briefs.notebook: Three-zone lab notebook workspace. Left sidebar hosts the hierarchical page tree of projects, experiments, and entries with drag-to-reorder. Center pane renders the active standard notebook entry with title, metadata, and rich body. Right aside shows linked protocols, samples, and attachments.
page_briefs.entry-detail: Focused entry view. Standard notebook entry fills the main column with timestamped author, tags, rich text body, and inline figures. Checklist protocol step panel lists the ordered procedure with check-off state, timers, and reagent callouts aligned to the entry.

shells.sidebar-aside: Three-column shell with left sidebar, main content, and right aside
